ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Vegetables 31% (broccoli, sweetcorn, carrots, onions), Breadcrumbs 28% (rice flour, water, gram flour, maize starch, maize flour, sunflower oil, salt), British chicken breast 22%, Potatoes 19% (potatoes, water, dried potato).
